name: 3dtiles-viewer
description: Open an interactive local viewer for 3D Tiles tilesets and save updated root transforms.
author: William Liu <lyz15972107087@gmail.com>

scripts.test: node -e "const path = require('path'); const api = require('./src'); if (typeof api.startViewerSession !== 'function' || typeof api.runViewer !== 'function' || typeof api.resolveAndValidateTilesetPath !== 'function') process.exit(1); if ('resolveAndValidateViewerDir' in api || 'parseArgs' in api || 'run' in api || 'usage' in api) process.exit(1); if (api.resolveAndValidateTilesetPath('./out_tiles/tileset.json') !== path.resolve('./out_tiles/tileset.json')) process.exit(1); console.log('ok')"
